strategy: Low health (5,690) with two Mock Roach minions - AoE both roaches and her together, or clear the roaches first.
Hit with Death - she takes 30% more from Death and resists Life 42%.
She hands each wizard Quasi-Bargain cards on round 1 and every 3rd round; they clutter your hand, so discard or ignore them and stick to your setup.
Stack a blade or two and a Feint, then land one AoE to end it.
cheatNotes: Round 1 she gives every wizard three Quasi-Bargain cards. They fill your hand - discard or ignore them.
Every 3rd round she hands out another Quasi-Bargain. Keep discarding and focus your own spells.
